lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I go about protecting this nautical fellow from the curse of the culinaromancer then?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Hmmm... Wait a moment, my fortune-teller-sense is tingling...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm... okay...

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Ah yes. To immunise him from the culinaromancer's attack, you will need to feed him fishcakes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fishcakes? What, like chocolate cake with fish instead of chocolate?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: No... Like small bread crumbed fishy delicacies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... So how would I make those then?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I don't know. I am a fortune-teller, not a cook.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I don't suppose it occurred to you to ask the actual cook in the room right next door to us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooooh yeah... I'll be right back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How would I go about protecting this nautical fellow from the curse of the culinaromancer then?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Err... have you forgotten about the fishcakes already?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might have, I might not have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This time-travelling stuff just has me a little worn out ok?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: To immunise him from the culinaromancer's attack, you will need to feed him fishcakes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fishcakes? What, like chocolate cake with fish instead of chocolate?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: No... Like small bread crumbed fishy delicacies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... So how would I make those then?

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I don't know. I am a fortune-teller, not a cook.

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: I don't suppose it occurred to you to ask the actual cook in the room right next door to us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooooh yeah... I'll be right back!

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: And try not to forget this time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Wow! You were incredible! The way you defeated the Culinaromancer, you made it seem so easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... What?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: With the foods, and that big portal thingy, and everything!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I'm just glad you were around, who knows WHAT could have happened if you weren't able to help us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I don't have any clue what you...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Oh, right. This must be part of that whole time-bubble thing that Aris told me about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So the cook outside of the bubble remembers me having already saved the council members even though I haven't actually gone and done it yet...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Gah! This time travel stuff makes my head hurt!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I don't suppose you can remember exactly how I defeated him can you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course! Which bit can't you remember doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't quite remember how I managed to save that pirate...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: The pirate? Yes, you used fishcakes didn't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did? Er... I mean I did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Out of interest, could you just help me quickly with that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how to make fishcakes?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Fishcakes? As in with fish eggs and fish milk?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't be silly, that would never work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you check to see if there is a recipe for them?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Found it!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Apparently you need Ground Cod, Ground Kelp, Ground Giant Crab Meat and Breadcrumbs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get Ground Cod?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Well, if you use a pestle and mortar on a raw cod that will grind it up nicely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get Ground kelp?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: There are apparently some kelp patches off the coast near Rimmington. Murphy knows more about that.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: As for the grinding part, all you have to do is use a pestle and mortar on it, that ought to get it sorted.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Murphy also used to bring in Giant Crabs occasionally. He hasn't had any of them in for a while though.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: You had best go and have a word with him to see if he can tell you what happened.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get Ground Giant Crab meat?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Well, Murphy used to bring in Giant Crabs occasionally. He hasn't had any of them in for a while though.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: You had best go and have a word with him to see if he can tell you what happened.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Oh, and there are apparently some kelp patches off the coast near Rimmington. Murphy knows about that too.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: As for the grinding part, all you have to do is use a pestle and mortar on it, that ought to get it sorted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get Breadcrumbs?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: That's easy, all you do is use a knife to slice the bread up into tiny, tiny chunks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did I do with all of it?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I'm not entirely sure. What am I, an encyclopedia?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I'll have a look through my cookbook while I wait for the ingredients.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll go out and get all of the stuff and bring it to you.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Is there anything else you need to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: No problem!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Murphy, what can you tell me about giant crabs?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Giant Crabs? Why, I used to haul up a few of those whenever I set my nets around Rimmington.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Why the interest?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to get some Giant Crab Meat and Kelp. Can you tell me where I can get some?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, the only thing I can think to do is to go down there and look to see if there are any left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go down there? What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: As in under the water!

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Tell me, can you get your hands on a fishbowl?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure I will be able to if I put my mind to it, why do you ask?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, I know how to rig up a handy set of breathing gear that can allow you to keep air inside the fishbowl.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: You just put the barrel of air on your back, with the fishbowl over your head, and then dive over the side.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: It should hold enough air to keep you alive for quite some time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds pretty dangerous...

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Not at all. I'll even weigh anchor with the chain somewhere easy to reach so you can climb out easily enough if you run into trouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still not happy about this...

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, I can't think of any other way to check. If you come up with a better plan then feel free to tell me.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: In the meantime I'll wait, and if you want me to take you diving I'll be ready.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: By the way, why are you so interested in crabs all of a sudden?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't tell you I'm afraid. The very fabric of space and time could collapse!

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, I guess some people will do anything for a bit of fresh seafood.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Ahoy there! Up for a bit of a swim?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not just yet.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, whenever you want me to get you some diving gear, just come and see me with a fishbowl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I certainly am.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Great! I'll sort that fishbowl out for you.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure this is safe?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Sure! It's as sound as my ship!

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Want me to take you out now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, Let's go diving.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well I can't take you out until you are properly geared up.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: We lost three diving parties that way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, well I'll just put my diving helmet and diving backpack on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not just yet.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Ok, well I'll be here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Murphy, can I get another diving helmet?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well sure, just as soon as you have some spare space for it.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Sure, here you go. Try not to lose this one, I'm not a very good glassblower.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, the bowls I make tend to shatter under pressure into razor-sharp shards of lethal, face shredding shrapnel.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Don't let it bother you, I think I know what I'm doing wrong now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Murphy. Do you have a spare diving backpack?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Sure, I have plenty after the...little incident.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What 'little incident'?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Nothing to worry yourself about.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, I have plenty of them under the tap, getting sluiced off. When you have space for one come and see me.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Here, have this one. Only dropped once!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that blood?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: No, no.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, yes.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: But seriously, what are the chances of getting a jellyfish jammed in there again?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Ahoy there! All set for a dive?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, Let's go diving.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well I can't take you out until you are properly geared up.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: We lost three diving parties that way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, well I'll just put my diving helmet and diving backpack on.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well that's the sort of spirit I like to see. However you are far too heavy to go diving right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, I can't take you diving if you are carrying more than 27kg worth of equipment.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: We arrived at that number through trial and error, and the errors were not pretty let me assure you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what can I do?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Well, if you pop over to a bank and leave all your heavy equipment behind then I'll take you out.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: See you then!

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: You want that cat of yours to drown or something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean you can't make them an adorable set of tiny diving gear?

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: No. Just...no.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: I'm not taking you out for a dive with that cat following you.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: I'm not a cat person, and it'd have to stay on the ship while you were down.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Ok, let's be off then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, see you soon Murphy!

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Good luck, I'll weigh anchor. Climb up the chain to get aboard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not just yet.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Ok, well I'll be here if you change your mind.

sections.title: Trying to enter the Underwater Cavern Entrance early

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Silly fishy! You lookin' like likkle Mogre wid your likkle arms an' wid your likkle legs!

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Swim along silly round head fishy!

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Dont let dem big skippies eat you!

sections.title: Trying to open the Pen Door early

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Hey! Nung says no fishies in da big crunchy claws!

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: You want crunchies, you talk to him, an' hope he not hungry!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Hey, silly fishy wit da round head!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Me?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya! What kinda fishy you's tinkin you are?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not any kind of fishy, err, fish.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Well what you doin' here if you's no a fishy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'm trying to get some Giant Crab meat.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Dis fishy is a funny fishy!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Whats this fishy wanting?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You see those big crabs? I want one of those.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: You's here to stealin' my big crunchy claws?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Nung should smash your stoopid round head!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Always the big nettings was taking my big crunchy claws, I put them in the cages, and now you's come to get them.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Swim away little fishy or I eat you till you's dead!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, could I buy some of the crab meat?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Silly round head fishy want to swaps big crunchy claws?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Naaah...you no real deal. I bet you no do Nung big favour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seriously, I need to get that meat. I'll do your big favour if you want.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Hah! Silly round head fishy! If you get Nung 5 big skippy skins, den maybe Nung thinking you ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Big skippy skins?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya, da big skippies live over dere.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: You need lotsa big big stones to get down dere. Den you kill da big skippies and bring da skins to Nung.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: You do dis, den maybe Nung let you swaps da big crunchy claws.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Hey fishy! You gots da skippy skins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Den no crunchy claws for you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nung, I have your giant Mudskipper Skins.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: What you say? Has da silly round headed fishy got da big skippy skins?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sigh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have the big skippy skins.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Silly round head fishy done good! Gimme!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya, dis fishy is a good fishy, but it no count good like Nung! Nung say dere are dis many hides left for da fishy to get.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Go get me da hides little fishy!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya, da round head fishy does a good big favour for Nung.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: I am thinkin you's ok enough to swaps the giant crunchy claws now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! How much do you want for them?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: You's gotta get me somefing to make dese hides to a cloak and flippers and hat, den I lets you have all the big crunchy claws you can get.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: But it not be easy

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I'll do it. What do I need? An item of ancient power? Something from the deepest, darkest dungeon in the world?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of monsters will I need to fight? I'd best grab myself some potions too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will there be traps? Should I bring cakes?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya, it real dangerous for a fishy.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: You's gotta go up to da topsies, and your gotta get a needly-thing and some wirey stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A needle.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And bronze wire.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya. Tree wirey stuffs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, all I have to do is bring you three rolls of bronze wire and a needle, and I can have all the Giant Crabs I can kill?

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Ya, but be a sneaky round head fishy. Da topsies has not water for a little fishy like you to breathing.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: It REAL dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, sounds it.

sections.title: Talking to Nung without the wire and needle

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Has da fish brung Nung the wiry stuff and the needly thing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Nung not supprised, the upsies is real scaredy for da little fishies like you.

sections.title: Talking to Nung with the wire and needle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nung, I have the needle and wire.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Nung thinks this is a useful fishy he finds. Gimme!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Nung have all da wiry stuff and needly things he needs to make da biggestest skippy skin hat ever!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: You's a good little fishy, you eat as many big crunchy claws as you want.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Maybe you get big and strong like Nung!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: Hey fishy. If you's a good fishy I might sell yous bitses of skippy skin clothes.

lines.speaker: Nung
lines.text: But Nung needs time to makes them first.

sections.title: Trying to enter the crab pen

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Hey! Nung says no fishies...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just spoke to Nung, he said it was ok.

lines.speaker: Mogre Guard
lines.text: Well...if Nung say it ok, den go ahead.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: How did it go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not too bad.

lines.speaker: Murphy
lines.text: Great, I'll take us back in.

sections.title: Using raw cod oon a pestle and mortar
Using crab meat on a pestle and mortar
Using kelp on a pestle and mortar
Trying to combine the ingredients early

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we talk about what happened in the dining room?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Wow! You were incredible! The way you defeated the Culinaromancer, you made it seem so easy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... I don't suppose you can remember exactly how I defeated him can you?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Of course! Which bit can't you remember doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't quite remember how I managed to save that pirate...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: The pirate? Yes, you used fishcakes didn't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did? Er... I mean I did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Out of interest, could you just help me quickly with that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have all the ingredients for fishcakes!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Great! Just like before! I've been reading the recipe and I know how to make the fishcakes now.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: It's pretty simple actually. All you have to do is use the ingredients on each other and then cook the fishcakes on a range.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's it?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Yes. I thought that there was a page missing from the cookbook because it seemed so easy, but it turns out it really IS that easy!

sections.title: Inspecting Pirate Pete while holding fishcakes

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Stop messing about and use the fishcakes on him!

sections.title: Using the fishcake on Pirate Pete

lines.speaker: Aris
lines.text: Good work adventurer, I've teleported them away to safety! You only have [number] council members left to protect!
